description.zh: 问题是占卜的灵魂，牌阵是其骨骼。好的占卜需要确保问题的深度与牌阵的广度相匹配。
description.en: The question is the soul of a reading, the spread is its skeleton. A good reading matches the question's depth with the spread's breadth.

simple.zh: 日常启发/快速查询 → 单牌或三牌阵
simple.en: Daily inspiration / quick queries → Single card or Three-card spread

moderate.zh: 感情、职业、决策类问题 → 三牌阵或爱情牌阵
moderate.en: Relationships, career, decision questions → Three-card or Love spread

complex.zh: 重大人生决策、复杂局势 → 凯尔特十字或十二宫牌阵
complex.en: Major life decisions, complex situations → Celtic Cross or Zodiac spread

timeBased.zh: 时间周期预测 → 周运/月运/年运牌阵

spiritual.zh: 灵性探索、身心平衡 → 脉轮牌阵或生命之树
spiritual.en: Spiritual exploration, mind-body balance → Chakra or Tree of Life spread

questionType.zh: 因果或时间类（事情如何发展？）
questionType.en: Causal or temporal (How will things develop?)

causal.zh: 线性布局：过去→现在→未来 或 现状→行动→结果

questionType.zh: 平衡/多维度视角（审视事物的多个方面）

multidimensional.zh: 平衡布局：身→心→灵 或 想法→感受→行动

questionType.zh: 决策类（在两个选项间选择）

decision.zh: 基础式布局：选项A→选项B→关键决策信息
decision.en: Foundational layout: Option A→Option B→Key Decision Info

questionType.zh: 冲突与障碍分析（什么阻碍了我？）
questionType.en: Conflict and obstacle analysis (What blocks me?)

obstacle.zh: 交叉布局：现状→障碍（横跨）→建议

principles.zh: 开放式问题比是非题更能解锁牌阵中的层层指引。如「关于这个情况我能学到什么？」优于「他会回来吗？」
principles.en: Open-ended questions unlock more layers of guidance than yes/no. 'What can I learn from this situation?' is better than 'Will he come back?'

principles.zh: 赋能式提问：将「我什么时候会遇到真爱」转为「我该如何准备好迎接一段关系」——让牌阵提供可执行的建议。
principles.en: Empowering questions: Change 'When will I find true love?' to 'How can I prepare for a relationship?' — eliciting actionable guidance.

principles.zh: 问题的深度应与牌阵的广度匹配。浅显的问题不需要十张牌来回答；深刻的问题不应被压缩到一张牌里。
principles.en: Question depth should match spread breadth. Shallow questions don't need ten cards; profound questions shouldn't be compressed into one.

after.zh: 关于这段关系中的情感动态，我需要了解什么？
after.en: What do I need to understand about the emotional dynamics in this relationship?

after.zh: 留在当前工作和寻找新机会，各自会给我带来什么？
after.en: What would staying in my current job vs. seeking new opportunities each bring me?

before.zh: 我的运气什么时候会好？

after.zh: 我这个月需要关注哪些能量变化来创造更好的机遇？
after.en: What energy shifts should I focus on this month to create better opportunities?
